subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God! In the mighty Qur'án, through the tongue of His Holiness Moses, the words "Verily, I perceive a fire" have been clearly expressed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان حق در قرآن عظیم از لسان حضرت کلیم او اجد علی النار هدی بیان مبین
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @being a source of light; guidance
